productDisplayName: Clarks Women Blue Ocean Black Heels
description: Revel in the comfort of pure leather and look stylish in ease in this pair of shoes from clarks. Pair it with western and ethnic wear, and look great both ways. This pair comes with a shoe bag to help you carry it around in ease.Heel: 2”UpperLeather upper with a closed toe, heel cup and a buckled ankle strapErgonomically curved leather lined footbed for all-day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with a TPU heel for absolute grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
